section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — cover page

- NAME: Rohit Khanna
- OFFICE TELEPHONE: (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ] / No [X]
- Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Stamps: HAND DELIVERED; LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER; 2017 APR 13 AM 9:30; OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES; handwritten initials "MC"; handwritten "Page 1 of 3"
- Penalty notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Transaction grid: greyed example row (JT / Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock / Sale X / 02/05/015 / 03/07/15 / amount B $15,001-$50,000) ignored per spec. First data row contains only the handwritten/typed text "Please see the attached" with no checkboxes marked and no dates; remaining 3 grid rows blank.
